mapper.select: SELECT gb.group_buy_seq AS groupBuySeq, gb.item_seq AS itemSeq, i.item_name AS itemName, gb.target_quantity AS targetQuantity, gb.current_quantity AS currentQuantity, gb.end_date AS endDate, gb.status, gb.created_at AS createdAt FROM group_buys gb JOIN items i ON gb.item_seq = i.item_seq JOIN group_buy_participants gbp ON gb.group_buy_seq = gbp.group_buy_seq JOIN stores s ON gbp.user_seq = s.user_seq WHERE s.user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY gb.created_at DESC
